creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this for your next breakfast date! 💚

If you enjoyed having breakfast at Tom and Serg and Common Grounds, then you’ll surely love The Guild! It’s from the same company, so you can expect great coffee and amazing food but in a more upscale setting. 

💰Approximate spend: AED 70-100 per person
📍 The Guild, ICD Brookfield Place, DIFC

Thanks to my Blog Babies @joanneventures @nheekeey_e @jaygii @maisiemaecaraos for this fun catch up breakfast date. 

I shared more on the vlog! Don’t forget to subscribe to my YouTube channel- Life with Lady Anne. 😘

Dubai • Breakfast in Dubai • Where to eat in Dubai • DIFC • Lady and her Sweet Escapes
